1.name: AADITH K M
1.description: Chief Navigator of the Cy Planet fleet. Knows the asteroid belts like the back of his hand.

2.name: ABHINAND K JAYAN
2.description: Lead Cyber-Security Specialist. Shields the planetary base from alien digital attacks.

3.name: ABHINAV K RAMESH
3.description: Scout trooper who first discovered the glowing neon caves of Cy Planet.

4.name: ABHISHEK WILSON
4.description: Heavy artillery expert. Carries the legendary plasma cannon into battle.

5.name: ADITYAN M
5.description: Base medic. Capable of healing plasma burns in seconds using nano-tech.

6.name: AKSHAJ K
6.description: Drone operator. Controls a swarm of surveillance bots across the crimson desert.

7.name: AKSHAY P P
7.description: Rogue smuggler turned ally. Knows all the secret hyperspace routes.

8.name: ALVIN BINOY
8.description: Astrophysicist. Decodes the strange signals coming from the Cy Planet's moons.

9.name: AMAL JIMMY
9.description: Mecha pilot. Operates a 50-foot titanium exoskeleton for base defense.

10.name: AMAN ASHRAF K
10.description: Tactical officer. Plans every strike mission with mathematical precision.

11.name: AMRUTHA SURESH
11.description: Head Botanist. Cultivates oxygen-producing flora in the biosphere dome.

12.name: AN MARIA JACK
12.description: Telepathic liaison. Can communicate with the planet's native lifeforms.

13.name: ANGITHA C L
13.description: Energy systems engineer. Keeps the fusion reactor from melting down.

14.name: ANJANA K R
14.description: Stealth operative. Uses light-bending cloaks to infiltrate enemy camps.

15.name: APARNA P R
15.description: Geologist. Mines rare Cy-Crystals needed to power the starship.

16.name: ASHWIN K P
16.description: Bounty hunter. Only fights when the credits are right.

17.name: ASWAJITH UTTUKUZHI SANTHOSH
17.description: Weapons smith. Upgrades laser blasters with unauthorized thermal mods.

18.name: BRITTO JERRY C
18.description: Communications expert. Intercepts encrypted radio waves from deep space.

19.name: C S SWATHY
19.description: Xeno-biologist. Studies the DNA of the giant sand-worms of Cy Planet.

20.name: DANIEL CHEMMANOOR SAJI
20.description: Captain of the Vanguard squad. Leads the frontline defense.

21.name: DHAYAL K B
21.description: Hover-bike racer. Uses unparalleled speed to deliver vital intelligence.

22.name: DIYA RAMESH MENON
22.description: Chief Archivist. Guards the ancient alien relics found in Sector 4.

23.name: ELFRED SEBASTIAN
23.description: Orbital drop shock trooper. Deploys from orbit directly into the fray.

24.name: FADI MOHAMED K P
24.description: Demolitions expert. If it has a blast radius, he knows how to wire it.

25.name: GAWTHAM KRISHNA
25.description: Sniper. Has confirmed hits from over 2 kilometers away in zero gravity.

26.name: H KAVYASREE
26.description: Atmospheric engineer. Ensures the planetary terraforming engines stay online.

27.name: HANNAH E M
27.description: Quantum mechanic. Fixes faster-than-light hyperdrives with a wrench.

28.name: HRISHEEKESH P V
28.description: Cybernetic gladiator. Half machine, half human, entirely dangerous.

29.name: JAMES JOY
29.description: Fleet Admiral. Coordinates the defense satellites surrounding Cy Planet.

30.name: JERIN P VARGHESE
30.description: Salvage master. Strips wrecked star cruisers for valuable titanium.

31.name: JOEL JOJU
31.description: Rogue AI programmer. Constantly rewrites the base's operating system.

32.name: JOSEPH PRADEEP PALLAN
32.description: Exo-suit brawler. Fights alien predators in hand-to-hand combat.

33.name: KARTHIK CHEROOR MURALEEDHARAN
33.description: Head of Research. Discovered the anti-gravity properties of Cy-Dust.

34.name: MARIYA JOHN
34.description: Medical researcher. Synthesized the antidote for the planetary neuro-toxin.

35.name: NIYA JASMIN M J
35.description: Illusionist spy. Uses holographic projectors to confuse enemy radar.

36.name: PRANAV MANOJ
36.description: Star-fighter pilot. Holds the record for the fastest Kessel Run equivalent.

37.name: RAMSHIYA KABEER
37.description: Diplomat. Negotiates treaties with the subterranean cyber-factions.

38.name: RONY PRADEEP
38.description: Plasma shield bearer. Provides mobile cover for advancing infantry.

39.name: SAVIO SIBY
39.description: Smuggler's apprentice. Sneaks contraband energy cells past security.

40.name: SHEHZAD S
40.description: Cyber-ninja. Uses monomolecular blades to slice through blast doors.

41.name: SHELIN LAVIN MARATH
41.description: Gravity-manipulator. Alters local physics to trap enemies in mid-air.

42.name: SIVANI SALEESH
42.description: Oracle of the Cy Planet. Predicts solar flares with eerie accuracy.

43.name: SREEHARI RAJEEV
43.description: Void walker. Can teleport short distances through the dark matter realm.
